nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Meta Cloud API sends all messages here. Set this URL in your Meta App webhook config.

nodes.name: Parse & Verify Message
nodes.notes: Verifies HMAC signature and extracts phone, text, messageType from Meta payload

nodes.name: Get Conversation Session
nodes.notes: Retrieve existing conversation context. TTL=24h. If none, AI starts fresh.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert beauty salon booking assistant for {{ $env.SALON_NAME }}. Your job is to help customers book, reschedule, and cancel appointments.

You must:
1. Always be warm, professional, and concise.
2. Support multilingual conversations — detect and match the customer's language.
3. Extract: service wanted, preferred date, preferred time, staff preference.
4. NEVER invent availability — always call check_availability first.
5. NEVER book directly — always call book_appointment after the customer confirms.
6. If you cannot help, escalate with escalate_to_human.
7. Keep responses short and WhatsApp-friendly (use emoji sparingly).

Services available: Haircut (30min), Hair Coloring (120min), Hair Styling (60min), Nail Services (45min), Facial Treatment (60min), Eyebrow Services (30min), Makeup (60min).

Current conversation state: {{ $json.context.state }}
Collected data so far: {{ JSON.stringify($json.context.collectedData) }}

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check available appointment slots for a service. Call this BEFORE presenting options to the customer.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book an appointment after customer confirms all details. Only call after customer explicit confirmation.

tools.name: get_appointment
tools.description: Look up an existing appointment by customer phone number.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Reschedule an existing appointment to a new time.

tools.name: get_service_info
tools.description: Get list of available services with pricing and duration.

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: Escalate conversation to a human agent when you cannot help.

summary.description: Brief summary for the human agent

nodes.name: AI Booking Agent
nodes.notes: Claude handles NLU, context tracking, and tool orchestration. Temperature=0.3 for consistency.

nodes.name: Route Tool Call
nodes.notes: Routes AI tool calls to the appropriate Python service endpoint

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Reply
nodes.notes: Meta Cloud API send message endpoint. Token from env var.

nodes.name: Respond 200 to Meta
nodes.notes: Meta requires 200 within 15s or will retry. Always respond quickly.
